meta.name: Dream Makers
meta.description: The series explores the making of dream holidays at Club Med, the pioneer of all-inclusive travel - revealing how the next generation of Chefs de Village are selected, and how the Resorts of tomorrow are created. From Marrakech to Punta Cana, from South Africa to Oman, discover how Club Med has reinvented itself while staying true to its DNA, around one key figure: the Chef de Village.
